page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Profile based illumina pair-end reads simulator
page_metadata.biotools__summary:
pIRS is a program for simulating paired-end reads from a reference genome.  It
is optimized for simulating reads similar to those generated from the Illumina
platform.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary:
pIRS is a program for simulating paired-end reads from a reference genome.  It
is optimized for simulating reads similar to those generated from the Illumina
platform.
